issue.title: Broad repo Python reduction sweep AL

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-238 changes.

notes: This lane documents an already Python-free checkout and hardens the active Go/shell operator surface with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane refreshes evidence instead of removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `7872e4fa`.
Remote verification matched local HEAD on `origin/BIG-GO-238`; see `git rev-parse HEAD` and `git ls-remote --heads origin BIG-GO-238`.
